title: claytonia scammaniana
intro: Claytonia scammaniana, also known as Miner's lettuce, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Claytonia scammaniana include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from symptoms of colds and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salad green, or supplement, and is often used in herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
